tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Read this article. DEI has only one purpose, and it has nothing to do with social justice or equity. Every person carries a moral frame that precedes any training module: conscience, faith, community. Romans 2:15: the law written on the heart. DEI exists to displace it. The endpoint is moral authority reassignment. Away from God, family, country, conscience. Toward the NGO-Administrative Complex. That's what the training was always for: consultation transfer. The military was a top target because it had to be.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：阅读这篇文章。 DEI只有一个目的，与社会正义或公平无关。每个人在任何培训模块之前都有一个道德框架：良心、信仰、社区。罗马书 2:15：律法写在心上。 DEI 的存在是为了取代它。终点是道德权威的重新分配。远离上帝、家庭、国家、良心。走向非政府组织行政综合体。这就是培训的目的：咨询转移。军队是首要目标，因为它必须如此。

tweets.content: Sad to see EU cutting their users off from the best liquidity in the world. Liquidity is the best consumer protection. Hope to see things change in the future.
tweets.translated: 很遗憾看到欧盟切断了用户与世界上最好的流动性的联系。流动性是对消费者最好的保障。希望未来能看到事情的改变。

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Brooo, OpenAI is back and they're releasing their new model GPT-5.6 Sol. With their benchmarks, OpenAI claims: - Sol Ultra beats Mythos 5 and mogs it for coding/workflow. - And is better for bio/cybersecurity too. Pretty bullish on OpenAI again if they leapfrogged Anthropic.
tweets.translated: Brooo，OpenAI 回来了，他们正在发布新模型 GPT-5.6 Sol。 OpenAI 在其基准测试中声称： - Sol Ultra 击败了 Mythos 5，并改进了它的编码/工作流程。 - 对于生物/网络安全也更好。如果 OpenAI 超越 Anthropic，他们会再次非常看好他们。

tweets.content: Morgan Stanley: Retained its forecast for the Federal Reserve to hold interest rates through year-end (no rate hikes). Michael Gapen said incoming data since the June FOMC meeting has made it "marginally more comfortable" in its no-hike baseline.
tweets.translated: 摩根士丹利：维持美联储年底前维持利率不变的预测（不加息）。迈克尔·加彭 (Michael Gapen) 表示，自 6 月 FOMC 会议以来收到的数据使其在不加息的基线上“稍微更加放心”。

tweets.content: just throwing out a random thought, the UBS report is anecdotally true + and it's interesting there's more Chinese reports on Anthropic distillation. Many US startups/companies using AI: Are using Chinese models like DeepSeek since they’re much cheaper than Gemini/OpenAI/Anthropic reasoning models for cost per task. Kinda a catch 22 when US is built on capitalism and everyone goes for the cheaper options. I think the US just has to get good and out innovate here: - both with heavy KYC-auth frontier models for US only like Mythos given those are being distilled by competitors. and amybe staggered tiers for allied partners so US is always ahead Maybe something like dedicated AI Google auth like FaceID + Persona would do the trick before access/key creation for the newer models, then short lived scopes. At least addressing those simpler fake/stolen account + pool allegations, requiring biometrics before use. Then US Gov drafting new regulations making it illegal for sharing access similar to identity forgery with bank accounts. - then the most obvious one is just heavily optimized reasoning models that mogs DeepSeek and others. Kinda good Trump admin paused Fable/Mythos access, imo not quite sure why a trillion dollar company keeps letting itself get distilled over and over again. There should be friction added if you’re accessing something close to ASI. TLDR: US just needs to good at cheap inference and add bank-grade authentication to AI model access. Easier said than done tho.
tweets.translated: 只是抛出一个随机的想法，瑞银的报告据说是真实的+而且有趣的是中国有更多关于人择蒸馏的报告。许多使用人工智能的美国初创公司/公司：正在使用 DeepSeek 等中国模型，因为它们的每项任务成本比 Gemini/OpenAI/Anthropic 推理模型便宜得多。当美国建立在资本主义基础上并且每个人都追求更便宜的选择时，这有点像第二十二条军规。我认为美国必须在这方面取得进步并进行创新： - 考虑到这些都是由竞争对手提炼出来的，美国只有像 Mythos 这样的重型 KYC 验证前沿模型。和 amybe 为联盟合作伙伴交错了层级，因此美国始终处于领先地位 也许像 FaceID + Persona 这样的专用人工智能谷歌身份验证之类的东西可以在为新模型创建访问/密钥之前发挥作用，然后是短暂的范围。至少解决那些更简单的假/被盗帐户+矿池指控，在使用前需要进行生物识别。随后，美国政府起草了新法规，规定与银行账户共享类似于身份伪造的访问权限是非法的。 - 那么最明显的一个就是深度优化的推理模型，它影响了 DeepSeek 和其他模型。特朗普政府暂停了《寓言/神话》的访问，我不太清楚为什么一家价值数万亿美元的公司不断让自己一次又一次地被提炼。如果您访问接近 ASI 的内容，应该会增加摩擦。 TLDR：美国只需要擅长廉价推理，并为人工智能模型访问添加银行级身份验证。说起来容易做起来难。
